ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Continued To Jun-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick Hall for Katherine Grimes (Administrator).

Mr. Hall stated that the File & Serve Express fees predated the petition for probate because they first tried to file a Heggstad petition, that proceeds from the sale that were in the Trust went into the Wells Fargo account and that the account was not titled in the name of the Trust. Mr. Hall also stated that the issue of why they are exempt from giving notice to the Director of the California Victim Compensation and Government Claims board was not addressed in his error and that this provision had no bearing in this case. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to June 19, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a declaration.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
